mapper.select: select userId, friendId from friend where userId = #{userId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into friend(userId, friendId, status, createTime) values (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from friend where (userId = #{userId} and friendId = #{friendId}) or (userId = #{friendId} and friendId = #{userId})
